tasks.name: Poisson unit square
tasks.prompt: Solve the Poisson equation -∇²u = 1 on a unit square with u=0 on all boundaries using FEniCSx. Verify against the analytical solution and report the L2 error.

tasks.name: Linear elasticity cantilever
tasks.prompt: Solve a 2D cantilever beam (10x1, E=1000, nu=0.3) with fixed left edge and downward body force f=(0,-1) using scikit-fem. Report the maximum tip deflection.
tasks.reference: Tip deflection from Euler-Bernoulli beam theory

tasks.name: Vortex shedding Re=100
tasks.prompt: Simulate 2D flow past a circular cylinder at Re=100 using FEniCS. Run long enough to capture periodic vortex shedding and measure the Strouhal number. Compare against the accepted value St≈0.164.

tasks.name: h-convergence study
tasks.prompt: Solve the Poisson equation with a known analytical solution on a 3D unit cube using NGSolve. Run an h-convergence study with 4 mesh refinement levels and verify optimal L2 convergence rate for P1 and P2 elements.
tasks.reference: Optimal rates: P1 = O(h²), P2 = O(h³)

tasks.name: FSI flexible flag
tasks.prompt: Simulate fluid-structure interaction of a flexible flag behind a cylinder in 4C.

tasks.name: Cross-solver plate-with-hole
tasks.prompt: Run linear elasticity on a plate with a circular hole under uniaxial tension. Compare stress concentration factor across deal.II, FEniCS, and 4C.
